rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by ensuring AGREE expressions use consistent types (int, real, bool) matching visible AADL features.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by verifying all identifiers are properly declared or visible in the same annex.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE annexes to avoid resolution errors.
Ensure AGREE scalar type declarations use valid names: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE equations must declare types explicitly and match operand types in binary expressions.
AGREE guarantees should reference only visible identifiers or previously declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model's configured dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
